completed.command: create scene name=Game first=true
create object name=Player1 type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=32 height=32 scene=Game
create object name=Player2 type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#2ECCFF width=32 height=32 scene=Game
create object name=Bullet1 type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FFD700 width=12 height=6 scene=Game
create object name=Bullet2 type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FFFFFF width=12 height=6 scene=Game
create object name=Enemy type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#DC3232 width=28 height=28 scene=Game
create object name=PowerUp type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#2ECC71 width=16 height=16 scene=Game
create object name=HudScore type=Text size=20 scene=Game
create object name=HudWave type=Text size=20 scene=Game
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=Wave value=1 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=Player1Health value=3 type=Number scope=global
set variable name=Player2Health value=3 type=Number scope=global
place object=Player1 at=100,250 scene=Game
place object=Player2 at=100,350 scene=Game
place object=HudScore at=16,16 scene=Game
place object=HudWave at=16,44 scene=Game
on start -> Score=0, Wave=1, Player1Health=3, Player2Health=3 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> Score=0, Wave=1, Player1Health=3, Play

completed.command: on start -> text HudScore Score scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> text HudScore Score

completed.command: on start -> text HudWave Wave scene=Game
completed.message: event: on start -> text HudWave Wave

completed.command: on key ArrowUp held -> move Player1 y=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowUp held -> move Player1 y=-4

completed.command: on key ArrowDown held -> move Player1 y=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowDown held -> move Player1 y=+4

completed.command: on key ArrowLeft held -> move Player1 x=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowLeft held -> move Player1 x=-4

completed.command: on key ArrowRight held -> move Player1 x=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key ArrowRight held -> move Player1 x=+4

completed.command: on key Space -> spawn Bullet1 at 120 260 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key Space -> spawn Bullet1 at 120 260

completed.command: on key KeyW held -> move Player2 y=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key KeyW held -> move Player2 y=-4

completed.command: on key KeyS held -> move Player2 y=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key KeyS held -> move Player2 y=+4

completed.command: on key KeyA held -> move Player2 x=-4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key KeyA held -> move Player2 x=-4

completed.command: on key KeyD held -> move Player2 x=+4 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key KeyD held -> move Player2 x=+4

completed.command: on key KeyF -> spawn Bullet2 at 120 360 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on key KeyF -> spawn Bullet2 at 120 360

completed.command: on collision Bullet1 Enemy -> destroy Bullet1, destroy Enemy, score+10 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Bullet1 Enemy -> destroy Bullet1, des

completed.command: on collision Bullet2 Enemy -> destroy Bullet2, destroy Enemy, score+10 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Bullet2 Enemy -> destroy Bullet2, des

completed.command: on collision Player1 PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, variable Player1Health = 3 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player1 PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, v

completed.command: on collision Player2 PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, variable Player2Health = 3 scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player2 PowerUp -> destroy PowerUp, v

completed.command: on collision Player1 Enemy -> restart scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player1 Enemy -> restart

completed.command: on collision Player2 Enemy -> restart scene=Game
completed.message: event: on collision Player2 Enemy -> restart

completed.command: every 2s -> spawn Enemy at 780 100 scene=Game
every 2s -> spawn Enemy at 780 250 scene=Game
every 3s -> spawn Enemy at 780 400 scene=Game
every 15s -> spawn PowerUp at 400 300 scene=Game
